item.title: Stupid human tricks
item.description:
Graceful dismount.
Ended as well as it could have!
The engagement
#Scorpion
I need this picnic table!
Both were at fault here
Safety Second!
Splort!
Russian hospitality #NSFWstyle
It’s Batgirl
I suspect this is in Minnesota, where I live
I think she’s gonna need a trip to the dentist
This one is very old, I’ve seen it many times, but it still makes me laugh. I’ve gotten my belt loop hooked on the dresser drawer handle more times than I’d like to admit.
The cop says “Nope, just leave her alone, let her go. She got this.”
I am certain they climbed over several warning signs on the way down. Doggie tried to warn them!
I honestly thought she was gonna lose an eye
This falls under the “hold my Cosmo” category
I upvote all comments for the first 72 hrs.
item.dc:creator: DaveSamsonite

item.title: Aaand they did it again. Ukraine destroyed Toropets II missile depot tonight. Very big badaboom.
item.description:
FIRMS data: Toropets mmunition depot which was targeted several days ago is on top, the one which was targeted tonight is at the bottom.
Abaout the attack on Toropets I: https://uawire.org/ukraine-reportedly-uses-triple-loaded-neptune-missile-to-strike-russian-ammunition-depot-in-tver-region
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: My cat turned 19. He loves pancakes
item.dc:creator: tuyehbhi

item.title: WHOLESOME Saturday Dump of Nice things to warm your heart
item.description:
1. He's always been cool
2. Building a tiny treadmill for a tiny hamster
3. Scratchies disable dog
4. Mlem
5. Wingman
6
7. Awwww
8. Damn that is exquisite
9. Happy doggo
10. Husband surprises bride by flying her parents for the wedding
11. You, you... you stop scrolling and listen for this lady for a sec
12
13
14. I need to find that store
15. Today I wanted to share with you that I started reading this awesome book called 'Blood, Sweat & Pixels'. It's about the history of various indie and mainstream games and the struggle of the devs to get them done. I have to say it's very inspiring and it helps me on my own journey as a game dev. To be honest, I've been working on the same game for almost 18 months now and it can get a bit frustrating. Imagine having to hold your focus on one thing for so long (while juggling everyday life). However this book inspired me and helped me re-start my passion. Anyway, if you want to support the game, a simple wishlist would mean the world to me. Please check it out on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ P.S. 1. This here is a plushie duck that I'm hoping a lot of players will develop affection for. P.S. 2HAVE A GREAT AND SUNNY WEEKEND, FRIENDOS!

item.dc:creator: LaunchpadMc

item.title: For a friend, for you
item.description:
Just like it says: I put together a package for a friend on all the basics for critical thinking, and thought other imgurians might be interested in it for themselves, or one of their friends. Please enjoy with my compliments...
It's all well and good to think critically, but you'll need some tools to do it. First, we need to evaluate what we are being presented...
That's great, but, applying critical thinking back on itself, what are some of the ways critical thinking can go awry? The biggest culprit: Biases.
Biases continue below
I hope you've found this either informative, useful to make your own gift for someone in your life, or simply useful as a resource.
item.dc:creator: ThePsychAutist

item.dc:creator: ajborges980

item.title: One Take - John Landis and Tim Matheson were just off screen tossing the items at him.
item.description: Comedy, especially physical comedy, often plays quite well if you can get it to play with as few cuts as possible. If you can do it in one shot, even better. During the scene in the grocery store where Flounder is tasked with catching assorted items being thrown his way, Landis and Tim Matheson were just off screen tossing the items at him. Landis did not necessarily expect Stephen Furst to nail it, but he managed to catch every item and crush the whole thing in a single take, much to the director’s amusement, and amazement.
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Lost cat walked 800 miles home!
item.description:

Rayne Beau

item.title: Swords Comic x Litterbox crossover! [OC]
item.description:
Matt from Swords Comic https://www.instagram.com/swordscomic got me good with this one!
The animated pilot is funded (THANK YOU!) but the more we raise the better it will be, so we've lined up a bunch of exclusive rewards that will only be available by backing! Check them out here: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/litterboxanimation/pilot-episode?ref=f52qpp

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
Hey it's MrPuckett here super excited for TheFreePizzaDude post today! If you'd like to help an Imgurian in need get some food, here's how it works -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we will send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been such a huge part of us being able to help more people, we love you - https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 6pm central
My foster Calvin is here to show you how it works for requests!
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
14,281 meals since we started 887 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Pizza Tally 101 1st, 2nd and 3rd by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni 113 4th and 5th by Pizza Angel @pot314 116 6th, 7th, 8th and 9th by Pizza Angel @TheCraicen 150 10th, 11th and 12th by @OP 215 13th, 14th, 15th and 16th by @OP 245 17th, 18th, 19th and 20th by @OP 330 21st by Pizza Angel @Sebastopol 400 22nd by Pizza Angel @debug200 415 Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant by Pizza Angel @TheCraicen 440 25th, 26th and 27th by @OP 530 28th and 29th by @OP 600 30th, 31st, 32nd, 33rd and 34th by Pizza Angel @StabbyTheCat 60p 35th by Pizza Angel @debug200 ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 35 meals That's 14,316 meals since we started 887 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude
